name: Punch Max
short_description: Dive into the action with Max, a boxer with extraordinary abilities, in a city overrun by dark forces.
detailed_description:
Dive into the action with Max, a boxer with extraordinary abilities, in a city overrun by dark forces.

"Punch Max" offers an exhilarating adventure through dangerous hideouts, where your fists have the power to stretch and strike enemies from afar.

Key Features:
  • Unique Stretching Mechanic: Control Max to deliver powerful, long-range punches.
  • Thrilling Hideout Battles: Navigate through three challenging levels in each hideout, unlocking doors and defeating bosses to advance.
  • Customizable Arsenal: Collect various gloves with special powers and ultimate abilities, alongside essential gear to boost your strength.
  • Epic Boss Fights: Each hideout ends in a climactic battle against a formidable boss, testing your skills and strategy.
